[+] Execution halted due to exception after 44 cycles.

=== ARCHITECTURAL STATE (CYCLE 44) ===
x0:    0 | x1:  336 | x2: -1859 | x3:    0 | x4:    1 | x5: 3253 | x6:    1 | x7:   -1 |

Branch Predictor Stats: 0/1 correct.
